# deleteSelectedItems(_:)

**Instance Method**

Deletes the currently selected items.

## Declaration

```swift
@IBAction @MainActor func deleteSelectedItems(_ sender: Any!)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object that sent the message.

## Discussion

This method is can be connected to a user interface item in Interface Builder.

## Deleting Selected Items

- **canDeleteSelectedItems**: Returns whether the selected items can be deleted.

items.description: Returns whether the selected items can be deleted.
